heading: Omitted
label: 1020a–2, 1020a–3 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 1020a–2, , , which related to maximum amounts available for administrative expenses, was from the Department of Agriculture and Farm Credit Administration Appropriation Act, 1957, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriation acts.act June 4, 1956, ch. 355, title IV70 Stat. 239Section 1020a–3, , , , which limited the aggregate amount of bonds issued and outstanding, was from the Department of Agriculture and Related Agencies Appropriation Act, 1962, and was not repeated in subsequent appropriations acts.Pub.
